statement.en: ZDHHC9 and its roles in oligodendrocyte maturation, function, and neuronal development
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is an embargoed thesis with no accessible abstract or content. Truth-value evaluation is impossible due to complete absence of evaluable propositions. The cited content (ZDHHC9 protein function in oligodendrocyte biology) is plausibly legitimate neuroscience, but cannot be assessed in this form.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 細胞の道のりを脂質の鎖で包むことで、静寂の螺旋が生まれる。
